comparability.age_weather_exposure_note: This rerun intentionally adopts the main-branch stable elderly behavior. Relative to the 200-Agent API and first 1000-Agent A0 runs, it changes the 60+ ride-hailing constant from -0.5 to 0.3, loads W2 age exposure weight 1.6, adds medical-need exposure weights, applies a 0.9 conditional fare-sensitivity multiplier to exposed necessary trips, and adds 3 perceived minutes per bus-metro transfer. Results are versioned as A1 and must not be treated as strict A0 replications.
comparability.traffic_representation: 200*30 and 1000*6 both represent 6000 trips; scaling increases Agent resolution without silently multiplying aggregate represented demand
